description: Incorrect example for Component Styling with Tailwind CSS
Correct example for Component Styling with Tailwind CSS

code:
// Dynamic class generation (not detected by Tailwind)
<div className={`bg-[${dynamicColor}]`} />
description: Incorrect example for Component Styling with Tailwind CSS

code:
// CSS variables
<div className="bg-[var(--color)]" style={{ '--color': dynamicColor } as React.CSSProperties} />
description: Correct example for Component Styling with Tailwind CSS
